subcodes.title: Du’a’ a’l-Ayyam (Prayers for the days of the week)
subcodes.first_line: O God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, O Thou Who art Being and Bringer of Being, Who art Eternity and Source of Eternity, Who art Ancient and Most Ancient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الصمد. اللهم انی اسئلک باسمک یا کائن یا متکون و یا ازل یا متازل و یا قدم یا متقدم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
